query:
SELECT 
  description,
  accountCode,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(lineAmount) as totalAmount,
  AVG(unitAmount) as avgUnit
FROM billing_items
GROUP BY description, accountCode
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 40;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  description,
  accountCode,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(lineAmount) as totalAmount,
  AVG(unitAmount) as avgUnit
FROM billing_items
GROUP BY description, accountCode
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 40;
